description: Linear Mapper 1D is a component that live maps one range to another, allowing for a reverse mapping of the target range value back to the source range when it is written to.

fields.Source: The value to map from ``SourceMin`` to ``SourceMax`` using ``Target``.
fields.Target: The value to map from ``TargetMin`` to ``TargetMax`` using ``Source``.
fields.SourceMin: The minimum of the range of the ``Source`` value.
fields.SourceMax: The maximum of the range of the ``Source`` value.
fields.TargetMin: The minimum of the range of the ``Target`` value.
fields.TargetMax: The maximum of the range of the ``Target`` value.
fields.AllowReverseMapping: Allow ``Target`` to map it's value to ``Source``'s ranged value when written to. See write backs.
fields.Clamp: Whether to prevent ``Source`` and ``Target`` from going outside their defined ranges.

usage: Can be used to keep the fullness of two different containers the same percentage wise based on purely the stored units and maximum capacity.
